name: Data Compressed
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Data Compressed
SIGMA Description: An adversary may compress data (e.g., sensitive documents) that is collected prior to exfiltration in order to make it portable and minimize the amount of data sent over the network.

False positives:
- Legitimate use of archiving tools by legitimate user.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%zip%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%gzip%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-k%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%tar%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-c%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Data Compressed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%zip%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%gzip%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-k%') OR (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%tar%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-c%')) AQL filter query
